zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Mede於大約1415年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Thomas Mede30歲，母親Margaret24歲。他於1442年與Isabel Ricard在英國布里斯托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1470年登記服兵役。他於1460年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1475年12月20日在英國布里斯托雷可利福享年61歲，埋葬在英國布里斯托雷可利福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Mede于大约1415年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Thomas Mede30岁，母亲Margaret24岁。他于1442年与Isabel Ricard在英国布里斯托结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1470年登记服兵役。他于1460年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1475年12月20日在英国布里斯托雷可利福享年61岁，埋葬在英国布里斯托雷可利福。

nameMeanings.name: Mede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Bartolo, Croce, Dante, Domenico, Giorgio, Luigi, Pietro, Salvatore, Vincenzo, Vito.  French/Haitian Guerline, Jean Marie.
Italian: from the female personal name Fede, from Latin fides ‘faith’.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name   Federico  .

variants.name: Federico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Antonio, Guerino, Armando, Salvatore, Domenico, Gino, Mario, Nino, Sal, Carmine, Guido, Alfredo, Angelo, Benito, Carmela.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Rosario, Enrique, Francisco, Juan.
Italian: from the personal name Federico, of ancient Germanic origin (see Friedrich ). Compare Federick and Frederico .

variants.name: Di Fede
meanings: Italian (Sicily): patronymic or metronymic from the male or female personal name   Fede  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Mede was born about 1415, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Mede, was 30 and his mother, Margaret, was 24. He married Isabel Ricard in 1442, in Bristol, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1470. In 1460, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 20 December 1475, in Redcliffe, Bristol, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Redcliffe, Bristol, England.

fr.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Mede est né environ 1415, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Mede, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Ricard en 1442, à Bristol, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1470. En 1460, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1475, à Redcliffe, Bristol, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Redcliffe, Bristol, Angleterre.

de.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Mede um 1415 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Mede 30 und seine Mutter Margaret 24. Er hat 1442 in Bristol, England Isabel Ricard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1470 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1460, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. Dezember 1475 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Redcliffe, Bristol, England und wurde in Redcliffe, Bristol, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Mede è nato il circa 1415 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Mede, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Ricard nel 1442, nel Bristol, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1470. Nel 1460, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 20 dicembre 1475, nel Redcliffe, Bristol, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Redcliffe, Bristol, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Medeが約1415年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Medeは30歳，母Margaretは24歳であった。1442年にイギリスブリストルでIsabel Ricardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1470年に兵役登録をした。1460年，46歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1475年12月20日にイギリスブリストルレドクリフで61歳で死去し，イギリスブリストルレドクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드c리프
ko.lifeSummary: Philip Mede(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mede(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1442년 영국 브리스톨에서 Isabel Ricard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1470년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1460년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1475년 12월 20일 영국 브리스톨 레드c리프에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 브리스톨 레드c리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Mede nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Mede, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Ricard em 1442, em Bristol, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1470. Em 1460, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1475, em Redcliffe, Bristol, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Redcliffe, Bristol, Inglaterra.

ru.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: бристол ст мэри редклифф, глоусестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Mede родился около 1415 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Mede было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Ricard в 1442 г. в местности бристол, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1470 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1460 году, в возрасте 46 лет, работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 20 декабря 1475 г. в местности редклифф, бристол, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности редклифф, бристол, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Mede nació aproximadamente 1415, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Mede, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel Ricard en 1442, en Bristol, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1470. En 1460, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1475, en Redcliffe, Bristol, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Redcliffe, Bristol, Inglaterra.
